description:
Interactive SVG controls lack accessibility support:
- EqKnob.tsx: no role='slider', no aria-valuenow, no keyboard support
- SynthKnob.tsx: same issues
- PanKnob.tsx: same issues
- VolumeFader.tsx: pointer-only interaction, no keyboard arrow keys
- SurroundXYPad.tsx: mouse/touch only, no keyboard navigation
- No <label> elements associated with form controls (only <span> text)

Fix: Add role='slider', aria-valuenow, aria-valuemin, aria-valuemax to all knob/fader
SVGs. Implement keyboard arrow key handling. Associate labels with controls.
title: Add accessibility: ARIA labels, keyboard navigation for controls
